name: Fat Free Pineapple Upside Down Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 9-inch pan with non-stick spray.
3. In the bottom of the pan, stir together the first three topping ingredients and place in the heated oven for 3 minutes.
4. Arrange pineapple rings in your preferred configuration (e.g., one on each side, one in the middle, and two cut halves at the corners).
5. Add cherries to the center of the fruit layers.
6. In a separate bowl, whisk together sugar and skim milk for one minute, then blend in Karo light corn syrup and vanilla.
7. In another bowl, whisk together egg whites, baking powder, salt, flour, and corn starch until smooth.
8. Pour the batter over the pineapple layer in the pan.
9. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Loosen the cake from the pan immediately after baking and invert it onto a serving plate.
Serving size: 12 servings
Calories: 200
Fat: 0 grams
